name: bobby-kennedy-a-raging-spirit
description: Chris Matthews' Bobby Kennedy: A Raging Spirit — a political biography tracing Robert F. Kennedy's transformation from ruthless political operative to compassionate champion of civil rights, the poor, and social justice, culminating in his 1968 campaign and assassination.
useCase: Understand RFK's remarkable political evolution — from McCarthy aide to compassionate leader — and the leadership lessons his transformation offers.
knownRisks: Matthews is an admirer of RFK — the biography is sympathetic rather than critical
Some political analysis reflects Matthews' own liberal perspective
The book focuses heavily on RFK's transformation narrative, downplaying inconsistencies
